form.formComment: Not far away at the last couple starts; Finished 4 m fifth behind Franco Santana at this track over 1609m 4yo last start. Before that was beaten 3.5 metres seventh again at this track in on March 14. Racing well and not without merit.

form.formComment: Finding it hard to put a couple of good runs together.
